film.title: Show Boat
film.overview: A dashing Mississippi river gambler wins the affections of the daughter of the owner of the Show Boat.

dialogues.dialogue: - Need any money? - No, thanks.  Goodbye, Steve.  No, I said we didn't.  Pride is smaller than kindness.  Thanks, Julie.  Captain Andy.  - Mr. Steve, I wants to say l... - Goodbye.

I love her.  And by heavens, I'm gonna see that she gets them.  And you, standing there... ...are you proud and happy, looking forward to a life with such as him?  ...are you proud and happy, looking forward to a life with such as him?  Yes, Mama, I am.
dialogues.cause_raw: her child's future life with a loved one

dialogues.dialogue: - Will you listen to me? - Even though I reek of the fleshpots... ...even though I cannot kiss the hem of your gown.  ...even though I cannot kiss the hem of your gown.  - I won't have you... - Though I am unworthy as they say... ...I still have my pride, madam, me pride.  ...I still have my pride, madam, me pride.  Gay, will you be sensible for once?

...even though I cannot kiss the hem of your gown.  - I won't have you... - Though I am unworthy as they say... ...I still have my pride, madam, me pride.  ...I still have my pride, madam, me pride.  Gay, will you be sensible for once?  Come here, you.
